disclaimer.title: Read before using YesBoth
disclaimer.scrollHint: ↓ Scroll to the bottom to continue
disclaimer.checkbox: I am of legal age and have read and accepted these terms. I understand that YesBoth is not a legal contract and that I remain fully responsible for my actions.

tool.title: ⚖️ Communication Tool
tool.content:
YesBoth is solely a communication aid tool.
It does not constitute a legally binding contract, a notarized document, or a certified legal service.

Legal, moral, and ethical responsibility rests exclusively with the parties using this tool. YesBoth disclaims all responsibility for the use of generated messages.

primacy.title: ⚠️ Primacy of Verbal Consent
primacy.content:
Verbal, gestural, or physical refusal ALWAYS prevails over any written document, without exception and without delay.

Silence does not constitute consent.
A past agreement does not cover any future unspecified act.

revocable.title: 🔄 Absolute Revocability
revocable.content:
Consent is revocable at any time, immediately, without justification, without notice.

No clause in this document can limit this right.
Each person remains fully responsible for their actions and decisions, regardless of any generated document.

responsibility.title: 🛡️ Responsibility
responsibility.content:
YesBoth disclaims all responsibility for the use of generated messages.

Legal, moral, and ethical responsibility rests exclusively with the parties. This document is a communication aid between consenting adults, nothing more.

age.title: 🔞 Age Requirement
age.content:
This application is strictly reserved for adults (18 years and older).
By continuing, you certify that you meet the legal age requirement in your country of residence.

step4.legalWarning: Important legal warning: YesBoth is a communication aid tool between consenting adults. This document in no way constitutes a legally binding contract, a notarized document, or legal proof. Verbal, gestural, or physical refusal always and immediately prevails over any written document. YesBoth disclaims all responsibility for the use of generated messages. Legal, moral, and ethical responsibility rests exclusively with the parties.
